name: Curriculum Creation, Evaluation, and Implementation
description: The learner evaluates and implements curriculum that aligns with standards, instructional goals, and student needs to support effective teaching and learning across educational settings.

name: Assessment for Learning and Student Learning Data
description: The learner applies valid and reliable assessment practices and data analysis to improve instruction, support student achievement, and communicate assessment data to teachers, school leaders, district administrators, stakeholders, and parents.

name: Evidence-Based Instructional Practices
description: The learner applies valid and reliable assessment practices and data analysis to improve instruction, support student achievement, and communicate assessment data to teachers, school leaders, district administrators, stakeholders, and parents.

name: Cultural Competence
description: The learner applies valid and reliable assessment practices and data analysis to improve instruction, support student achievement, and communicate assessment data to teachers, school leaders, district administrators, stakeholders, and parents.

name: Instructional Leadership and Collaboration
description: The learner applies principles of instructional leadership and collaboration with educators, stakeholders, and instructional teams to design and implement curriculum, assessment, and instruction to improve student achievement.

name: Foundations of Educational Research
description: The learner applies educational research and data analysis methods to evaluate curriculum, assessment, and instruction.

name: Educational Technology Tools and Principles
description: The learner selects, evaluates, and integrates educational technology tools and emerging digital resources to enhance engagement, accessibility, assessment, and instruction for all learners.
